Items.Description:
一旦暂停，exiluz 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，exiluz 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，exiluz 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 exiluz 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 exiluz 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 exiluz 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, exiluz will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, exiluz will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by exiluz will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If exiluz is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag exiluz:

exiluz consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging exiluz will restore default visibility to their posts.
Items.Author: exiluz
